items.definition_en: A quiz is a short test of knowledge.
items.example_en: We had a quiz in math class today.

items.definition_en: A test is a set of questions to check what you know.
items.example_en: I studied hard for the test.

items.definition_en: An exam is a formal test for students.
items.example_en: She is nervous about the English exam.

items.definition_en: A mark is the number or letter you get on a test.
items.example_en: He got a high mark in science.

items.definition_en: A score shows how many points you get in an exam.
items.example_en: My score was better this time.

items.definition_en: A grade is a letter or number that shows your result.
items.example_en: She got the best grade in class.

items.definition_en: A worksheet is a paper for writing answers.
items.example_en: The teacher gave us a worksheet for homework.

items.definition_en: An answer key has the correct answers to a test.
items.example_en: I checked my worksheet with the answer key.

items.definition_en: A checklist helps you remember what to do or check.
items.example_en: We used a checklist to review our writing.

items.definition_en: A rubric explains how work will be graded.
items.example_en: The teacher gave us a rubric before we started.

items.definition_en: Feedback tells you how well you did something.
items.example_en: My teacher gave me feedback on my essay.

items.definition_en: A portfolio is a folder of your work over time.
items.example_en: I showed my portfolio to the teacher.

items.definition_en: A progress chart shows how much someone has improved.
items.example_en: The progress chart is on the classroom wall.

items.definition_en: A questionnaire is a list of questions to answer.
items.example_en: We filled out a questionnaire in class.

items.definition_en: A report card shows a student's marks for the year.
items.example_en: My parents looked at my report card.

items.definition_en: A survey is a way to collect information from people.
items.example_en: Our teacher did a survey of our favorite books.

items.definition_en: A record sheet is a paper to write down results.
items.example_en: I wrote my spelling scores on the record sheet.

items.definition_en: A progress test checks what you have learned so far.
items.example_en: We have a progress test every month.

items.definition_en: An oral test is spoken instead of written.
items.example_en: I passed my oral test in English.

items.definition_en: A practice test helps you get ready for the real test.
items.example_en: We did a practice test before the exam.
